description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, build, and release, using the docker:dind service and defining the variables CONTAINER_IMAGE, DOCKER_DRIVER, and REPO_NAME. In the build stage add a dockerssh-build job that runs on the docker:stable image, logs in to the registry with "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY" in before_script, then executes "docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest || true", "docker build --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF .", and "docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF". Also in the build stage add a dsinit-build job using golang:latest, with before_script creating the GOPATH layout (mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/$(dirname $REPO_NAME); ln -svf $CI_PROJECT_DIR $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME; cd $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME/util/dsinit; go get) and a script that runs "GOARCH=amd64 GOOS=linux go build -a -o dsinit ." and stores the resulting util/dsinit/dsinit file as a build artifact. In the test stage add a format job on golang:latest, with before_script setting up GOPATH similarly (mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/$(dirname $REPO_NAME); ln -svf $CI_PROJECT_DIR $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME; cd $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME; go get) and a script that runs "go fmt $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)", "go vet $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)", and "go test -race $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/)". Finally, in the release stage add a dockerssh-release job on docker:stable that also logs in to the registry, then runs "docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF", "docker tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest", and "docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest", and configure it to run only on the master branch.
